# Talent Sourcer
Are you passionate about connecting talented individuals with exciting opportunities within the high tech world of Quantum and Cryo? Join us for a defined period and play a key role in shaping our team and driving success. As our Talent Sourcer, you’ll help us find our new colleagues. This is not a one man show. We will work close together to identify the best candidates for our future. If you like a fast-paced tech environment, have a knack for spotting potential, and enjoy building strong relationships, we’d love to welcome you to our team for this exciting phase! For the right candidate there might be other opportunities along the way within HR. 
**Key Responsibilities:**
  * Handle the recruitment cycle, including job postings, sourcing, screening, interviewing, together with the team
  * Build and maintain a pipeline of qualified candidates through creative sourcing strategies and networking
  * Define job requirements and ensure alignment in candidate selection
  * Enhance the candidate experience by providing clear communication and timely feedback throughout the process
  * Correspond with candidates
  * Use data and recruitment tools to track


**What We’re Looking For:**
  * Proven experience in tech recruitment, either in-house or at an agency
  * Strong communication and relationship-building skills
  * Ability to manage multiple recruitments simultaneously in a dynamic environment
  * Familiarity with Applicant Tracking Systems 
  * A passion for finding and nurturing talent to build exceptional teams
  * Background within HR is preferable 


Ready to help us grow? Apply today and be part of our journey!
**About us:** SCALINQ is a prominent player in the growing field of quantum computing. Our core focus is the development of state-of-the-art cryogenic hardware. All our products are classified as enabling hardware and are vital for the overall performance of a quantum computer. This could be your opportunity to play a key role in unlocking the full potential of a new tech era when finding the tech resources – the people forming the knowledge of the company.
**The Team:** At SCALINQ, diversity and inclusion are at the core of who we are. Our greatest strength lies in the people who shape our company, each contributing their unique skills and perspectives. Together, we blend cutting-edge research expertise with traditional engineering practices to develop innovative and commercially viable solutions. Joining our team means being part of a dynamic environment where every contribution matters.
**What we offer:** At SCALINQ, we have a multicultural environment, healthcare benefits, opportunities for professional growth in a state of the art industry and there is more to come. You’ll be part of a supportive and innovative team, working in a modern environment designed to inspire creativity and collaboration. Join us and thrive in a workplace that values your well-being and ambitions. Sounds like fun, join us!
The role is a fixed term employment of 6 months, 75%-100%. But for the right person there might be opportunities and development within HR. 
**Join Us:** If you think it sounds like fun please, apply by sending your resume and a cover letter. Apply [here](https://www.careers-page.com/scalinq/job/QVR556Y6/apply). Mark your application with TALENT SOURCER.
Let’s explore the quantum future together!
![SCALINQ logo 2024 white](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/SCALINQ-logo-2024-white.png)
We aim to solve the inevitable problems when scaling quantum bits in superconducting and spin-qubit-based processors through high density components. Stemming from research, we develop novel hardware solutions which simplify the advancements of quantum computers. We offer solutions to research institutes and quantum computing developers worldwide.
© 2025 SCALINQ. All rights reserved.

			<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-414d9c31 e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-parent" data-id="414d9c31" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
					<div class="e-con-inner">
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6ab41a7c elementor-widget elementor-widget-theme-post-title elementor-page-title elementor-widget-heading" data-id="6ab41a7c" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="theme-post-title.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h1 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Talent Sourcer</h1>				</div>
				</div>
					</div>
				</div>
		<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c91473f e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-parent" data-id="c91473f" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">
					<div class="e-con-inner">
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-fc222d7 elementor-widget elementor-widget-theme-post-content" data-id="fc222d7" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="theme-post-content.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Are you passionate about connecting talented individuals with exciting opportunities within the high tech world of Quantum and Cryo? Join us for a defined period and play a key role in shaping our team and driving success. As our Talent Sourcer, you’ll help us find our new colleagues. This is not a one man show. We will work close together to identify the best candidates for our future. If you like a fast-paced tech environment, have a knack for spotting potential, and enjoy building strong relationships, we’d love to welcome you to our team for this exciting phase! For the right candidate there might be other opportunities along the way within HR. </p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Handle the recruitment cycle, including job postings, sourcing, screening, interviewing, together with the team</li>



<li>Build and maintain a pipeline of qualified candidates through creative sourcing strategies and networking</li>



<li>Define job requirements and ensure alignment in candidate selection</li>



<li>Enhance the candidate experience by providing clear communication and timely feedback throughout the process</li>



<li>Correspond with candidates</li>



<li>Use data and recruitment tools to track</li>
</ul>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What We’re Looking For:</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Proven experience in tech recruitment, either in-house or at an agency</li>



<li>Strong communication and relationship-building skills</li>



<li>Ability to manage multiple recruitments simultaneously in a dynamic environment</li>



<li>Familiarity with Applicant Tracking Systems </li>



<li>A passion for finding and nurturing talent to build exceptional teams</li>



<li>Background within HR is preferable </li>
</ul>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Ready to help us grow? Apply today and be part of our journey!</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>About us: </strong>SCALINQ is a prominent player in the growing field of quantum computing. Our core focus is the development of state-of-the-art cryogenic hardware. All our products are classified as enabling hardware and are vital for the overall performance of a quantum computer. This could be your opportunity to play a key role in unlocking the full potential of a new tech era when finding the tech resources – the people forming the knowledge of the company.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>The Team: </strong>At SCALINQ, diversity and inclusion are at the core of who we are. Our greatest strength lies in the people who shape our company, each contributing their unique skills and perspectives. Together, we blend cutting-edge research expertise with traditional engineering practices to develop innovative and commercially viable solutions. Joining our team means being part of a dynamic environment where every contribution matters.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>What we offer: </strong>At SCALINQ, we have a multicultural environment, healthcare benefits, opportunities for professional growth in a state of the art industry and there is more to come. You’ll be part of a supportive and innovative team, working in a modern environment designed to inspire creativity and collaboration. Join us and thrive in a workplace that values your well-being and ambitions. Sounds like fun, join us!</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The role is a fixed term employment of 6 months, 75%-100%. But for the right person there might be opportunities and development within HR. </p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>Join Us:</strong> If you think it sounds like fun please, apply by sending your resume and a cover letter. Apply <a href="https://www.careers-page.com/scalinq/job/QVR556Y6/apply" target="_blank" rel="noopener">here</a>.  Mark your application with TALENT SOURCER.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Let’s explore the quantum future together!</p>
